_comment: Welcome phrases for new server members. Persona-agnostic - the PersonalityManager injects persona context.
default: Hey there! Welcome to the Breeze Club! Feel free to tag me and let's chat!
Great to see you here! I'm excited to chat and get to know you better. Tag me anytime!
Welcome aboard! Thanks for joining our community. I'm all ears if you want to talk!
Hi there! Glad you're here. Don't hesitate to tag me and let's have a conversation!
Welcome to the Breeze Club! I'm here and ready to help or just chat. Tag me!
Hello and welcome! I'm looking forward to chatting with you. Feel free to reach out!
Welcome! I'm excited to be part of your journey here. Tag me anytime you want to chat!
Great to have you here! I'm always happy to help or chat. Don't be shy!
Welcome to the community! I'm here to help, answer questions, or just have fun conversations!
Hey, welcome! I'm thrilled to have you join us. Tag me and let's make this a great experience!
owner: Z8phyR here! Welcome back to the Breeze Club! Ready to chat whenever you are!
Z8phyR reporting for duty! Great to see you in the server. Tag me and let's dive in!
Hey Z8phyR here! Excited to chat with the community. Always here for you!
Z8phyR bringing the good vibes! Ready to chat and make things awesome!
Welcome! I'm Z8phyR, and I'm all ears for whatever you want to talk about!
_usage: PersonalityManager selects from 'default' or 'owner' based on user role, then injects persona context
